name: Upside Gold Corp.
description: Upside Gold Corp. is a junior exploration company advancing the Kena Gold-Copper Project near Nelson in the Kootenays region of southern British Columbia, covering 10,114 hectares with a historical resource of 3.33 million ounces of gold. The company listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE) in January 2026 and is conducting geological, geophysical, and geochemical programs to outline a mineralized trend extending at least 7 kilometres along strike. Upside Gold is an early-stage explorer focused on expanding and upgrading the Kena resource toward a modern compliant estimate.
